title: The team — Replication Radar
intro: Replication Radar is built in the open for the OpenAIRE AI Hackathon. It's a small, growing team — and contributors become part of it. Each bio below is a Markdown file in `site/bios/`. If you'd like to help, see "Join the team" at the bottom.

members.name: Anne Fouilloux
members.role: CTO, LifeWatch ERIC · turning CoARA into practice

contribute.heading: Join the team
contribute.body: Want to help? Open an issue to say hi, then add yourself with a short pull request — two small steps:
steps: Write your bio as Markdown in `site/bios/your-name.md` (a sentence, then a few bullets — whatever you like).
Add one entry to `site/team.json` with your name, role, the path to your `.md`, your links and (optionally) a photo.

example.name: Your Name
example.role: Your role — e.g. Research Software Engineer
example.photo: optional — a headshot URL or filename in site/, only if you'd like one
